title: Why Joz Screening Answer
summary: Concise recruiter-facing answer explaining why Joz stands out for serious AI, product, and systems roles.

verification.notes: Derived from verified CV, profile, and recruiter-screening facts already present in the knowledge base.

claims: Joz combines product judgment, engineering delivery, UX, and applied AI systems thinking in one profile.
Joz has 13+ years of professional experience overall and 8+ years in ML/AI.
Joz is strongest in ambiguous, signal-rich environments that need deployable systems rather than generic AI talk.
proof_points: Verified CV evidence spans finance, insurance, media, public-sector innovation, spatial computing, and intelligent interfaces.
Verified experience framing already establishes 13+ overall years and 8+ years in ML/AI.
